experimental_system: non-human; non-immune system; rat liver (hepatocytes/MAFLD model), no T cells

supporting_excerpt: Diffusion-based model generates epitope-specific TCRs and predicts TCR-epitope binding.
rationale: Deep-learning TCR generation/binding predictor; no ZNF706, no inhibitory phenotype, no experimental T cell work.

experimental_system: mouse conventional and innate T cells
supporting_excerpt: PLZF was stably suppressed and not inducible in non-innate T cells via TCR signaling.
rationale: Concerns the zinc-finger TF PLZF/Zbtb16 lineage regulation, not ZNF706, and addresses differentiation not TCR inhibition.
